name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect behavior, a build failure, or a documentation problem
title: ""

---

## Problem

Describe the observed behavior and why it is incorrect.

## Reproduction

Provide the smallest relevant Lean snippet, command, or documentation path.

## Environment

Include the operating system and output of `lake env lean --version` when
relevant.

## Additional Context

Link related blueprint nodes, declarations, or issues.
